title: Outlook Alias Email Inbound Integration

posts.author: George (George Polyard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All!

  • I have an alias email connected to my main Outlook email. The email address is for support requests. There’s not a separate login for the alias email.
  • The goal is that when an email is received in the Support inbox, it generates a new item in a Monday.com board.
  • This integration works with my main email, though I can’t figure out how to integrate with the alias email.

Any help is greatly appreciated!

posts.author: Techryan (Techryan Inc.)
posts.cookedHtml: We need this to work as well? Any updates 2.5 years later?
